subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — it was a pleasure connecting at the conference, and I'm glad you'd like to take things further.

We'd love to get a formal meeting on the calendar. Here are some slots that work well on our side:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Any of these work for you? Just let us know and we'll confirm the details.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal personnel contact information. If you'd like to connect with senior stakeholders, I'd suggest reaching out through our public website where you'll find the appropriate contact channels. We can also discuss the best way to involve the right people once we've had our initial call.

Thanks again, and looking forward to speaking soon!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
